channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Why We Started Writing About Cybersecurity
item.description: Cybersecurity has stopped being a topic only for large enterprises. Today, even small businesses depend on: cloud services, email communication, electronic signatures, WordPress websites, remote...

item.title: GitHub vs GitLab
item.description: GitHub vs GitLab — Which One Should You Use? Version control platforms are essential for modern development. Two of the most popular choices are GitHub and GitLab. Both are built around Git, but...

item.title: The 55.8 Percent Productivity Number From Doshi And Vaishnav Is Narrower Than People Think
item.description: When Doshi and Vaishnav published their controlled experiment on AI code completion in Science (2023), the headline that propagated everywhere was "55.8% faster." Repeat it enough and it becomes...

item.title: Monorepo vs Multi-Repo: Why AI Agents Tip the Scale
item.description: The monorepo vs multi-repo debate ran for over a decade without a clear winner. That wasn't because engineers couldn't agree — it was because both models offered genuine advantages under different...

item.title: AI Psychosis in 2026 — What the New Evidence Actually Shows
item.description: A note before reading. This article discusses mental-health symptoms and psychiatric phenomena for general informational and educational purposes. It is not a diagnostic tool and is not a...

item.title: Android 17 is getting its own version of Apple’s Handoff
item.description: Google is adding a new Android feature that resembles Apple's Handoff, allowing you to start a task on your Android phone and continue it right where you left off from a compatible tablet....

item.title: Typosquatting Is No Longer a User Problem. It's a Supply Chain Problem
item.description: AI-generated lookalike domains are now embedded inside the third-party scripts running on your web properties. Here's why your current stack can't see them, and what detection actually requires....

item.title: Samsung workers set to strike at worst possible time
item.description: More than 47,000 Samsung Electronics workers are gearing up for an 18-day strike after bonus payment negotiations between the company and its union collapsed. The strike is set to start on...

item.title: Microsoft Releases Mitigation for YellowKey BitLocker Bypass CVE-2026-45585 Exploit
item.description: Microsoft on Tuesday released a mitigation for a BitLocker bypass vulnerability named YellowKey following its public disclosure last week. The zero-day flaw, now tracked as CVE-2026-45585, carries...

item.title: Grafana GitHub Breach Exposes Source Code via TanStack npm Attack
item.description: Grafana Labs, on May 19, 2026, said an investigation into its recent breach found no evidence of customer production systems or operations being compromised. It said the scope of the incident is...

item.title: GitHub Breached — Employee Device Hack Led to Exfiltration of 3,800+ Internal Repos
item.description: GitHub on Tuesday said it's investigating unauthorized access to its internal repositories after the notorious threat actor known as TeamPCP listed the platform's source code and internal...

item.title: Mercedes’ electric AMG GT 4-door coupe can go 0-60 in 2 seconds
item.description: The era of ultra-high performance Mercedes EVs is here. The German automaker finally revealed its new super sedan, the AMG GT 4-door coupe, with technology borrowed from the automaker's XX concept...

item.title: The next phase of OpenAI’s Education for Countries
item.description: OpenAI advances Education for Countries, expanding AI adoption in schools with new partnerships, teacher training, and tools to improve global learning outcomes.

item.title: Wear OS 7 will keep track of deliveries and sports scores on your wrist
item.description: Amid the flurry of today's Google I/O announcements, Google shared details about Wear OS 7, the next major update to its smartwatch platform. To help you keep track of things like deliveries and...

item.title: Plex is tripling the price of a lifetime pass to $750 after doubling it last year
item.description: I am dying to know how much money Plex is about to make the next six weeks charging people to stream their own video from their own homes. Today, it's giving every prospective customer until July...

item.title: Literary Prizewinners Are Facing AI Allegations. It Feels Like the New Normal
item.description: Three of five regional winners of the prestigious Commonwealth Short Story Prize are suspected of relying on chatbots. They’re certainly not alone.

item.title: Demis Hassabis said this might be the ‘foothills of the singularity.’ What?
item.description: Welcome to a "profound moment for humanity," according to Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis, who closed out Google I/O's keynote presentation on Tuesday, saying: Google's cutting-edge research...

item.title: We react to Google I/O 2026
item.description: What better way to unwind from a two-hour keynote presentation than to pore over the weirdest and wildest details, from a Gmail bot you can converse with to DeepMind's leader saying the...

item.title: Google just declared itself a contender in AI design at IO 2026
item.description: Google says it's designed the app to be accessible to everyone, from teachers to small business owners.

item.title: You can now talk to your Gmail inbox, as seen at Google IO 2026
item.description: Google expands Gmail’s AI Inbox with conversational voice search, letting users ask Gemini to find buried email details.

item.title: The future of Google is a search box that does everything
item.description: Last year, after watching Google's I/O keynote, I wrote that it felt like Google's future was Google googling. After watching this year's I/O keynote on Tuesday, I don't think Google just wants to...

item.title: How to use Google’s new AI agents to go beyond your standard searches
item.description: Google is launching AI-powered “information agents” that can monitor topics in the background and proactively alert users to updates and changes.

item.title: From teen hacker to Iron Dome researcher, this founder raised $28M to fight AI phishing
item.description: Ocean, an agentic email security platform, claims its AI can thoroughly analyze the context of every incoming email to detect fraud and impersonation attempts.

item.title: Nintendo’s $500 Switch 2 bundle includes a game, and it’s available now
item.description: Nintendo recently teased the “Choose Your Game” Switch 2 console and digital game bundle, coming in early June. However, multiple retailers (including Nintendo itself) are already offering the...

item.title: Google’s AI future demands trust — and your personal data
item.description: Google has big promises for its AI-powered future - and a lot of it depends on your trust. At I/O 2026, Google described a bunch of new tools that it claims will make your life easier. Gemini...
